## Summary

<!-- What does this PR add or change? -->

## Type

- [ ] New workflow command
- [ ] Improvement to existing command
- [ ] Bug fix (`install.sh` or other)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] Command follows the standard Markdown format (see CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] Tested the command/change in a real project
- [ ] Updated `README.md` if adding a new command to the available list
- [ ] No secrets, internal URLs, or personal data included
